title: ETH - can't send ethereum (even with ETH sufficient to cover the fees)

actions.value:
Are you trying to send ether to a custodial service?

It is possible that custodial services like exchanges require now higher fees to be paid, even for receiving ether and not only for sending.


In this case, I suggest you use custom fees:

From the Slide to confirm screen, tap the fee section, tap Custom, set the gas limit to 80'000 and the Gwei at the Standard value you can see here https://ethgasstation.info/ .


Now Save, go back and check the transaction fees. If you are ok with them, simply Slide to confirm.
Your transaction should be accepted.

Please let me know if you have further questions.

raw_title: ETH - can't send ethereum (even with ETH sufficient to cover the fees)
